title: balania formosana
intro: Balania formosana, also known as the Formosan balania, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Santalaceae and is native to Taiwan. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Balania formosana include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, which can be applied topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
